form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 9th (Sr4) over 1776m at Wagin, beaten 30 m by Wesmedad (2:13.70) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs M on March 27 at $19. Before that 11th (Sr2) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 25 m by Dat Lovely (2:05.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 24 at $10. Not keen.

form.formComment: Resumes today. His previous first-up run was successful when he posted a big 5.5 m win when quickly away, (Fr7) at Gloucester Park (2:46.30) beating Danger in 4yo+ MAIDEN on May 6 at $3.20. Might need some time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 7th (Fr4) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park, beaten 12 m by Arum (2:39.60) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 65 on March 27 at $8.50. At the previous start 5th (Fr2) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 16 m by Hi Suga Rush (2:04.30) in 4yo+ 0W/17K stake on March 20 at $4.80. Can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1177m at this track, beaten 6 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $11. form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eleventh after being driven well back, behind Graceful Shark at Gloucester Park over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 3 at $16. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Hes A Cool Mach at this track over 1177m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $41. Should be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 1823m at Narrogin, beaten 21 m by Nowuseemegrin (2:15.50) in 4yo+ 0-1 WIN on March 13 at $9.50. Showed ability the race before when he won by 2.5 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr4) held up early, at Bunbury (2:41.40) beating Staranna in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 6 at $1.14. Will be about the money.
